name: PT Kabelindo Murni Tbk
summary: PT Kabelindo Murni Tbk manufactures cables and other related products for telecommunication industries and for the distribution of electricity in Indonesia. It offers bare conductors and twisted cables; low voltage power cables, such as building, control, and instrument cables; medium voltage power cables; and flexible cables. The company also provides special cables for industrial installation, such as power stations, oil and petrochemical plants, high-rise buildings, mass transit underground passenger systems, and control connection networks. In addition, it provides construction services. The company was formerly known as PT Kabel Indonesia and changed its name to PT Kabelindo Murni Tbk in 1979. PT Kabelindo Murni Tbk was founded in 1972 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.
